content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market in risk-off: Nifty -1.15%, Bank Nifty -1.46%, Realty -2.30%, PSU Bank -2.00%, India VIX +10% to 18.57. Only IT marginally green; FMCG/Pharma defensives holding up. Global cues positive (Nasdaq +1.71%) but domestic FII/macro pressure dominant. Bias is to manage existing book tightly, trail SLs on winners (COFORGE, MARICO, LAURUSLABS), and avoid fresh aggressive entries into a high-VIX tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.44,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.8% unrealized, hit 1387 today. SL already trailed to 1355.44 (+7.7% lock-in, ~1.9% below CMP 1382 — respects 1% trail-gap rule). Q4 beat + Cigniti record date May 16 supports continued upside; raise target to 1450 (R:R from entry remains strong). Keep SL unchanged (already well above breakeven)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +2.5%, Q4 beat sustaining momentum, FMCG leadership today. SL already at entry 820 (breakeven, 1.93% below CMP 840 — respects trail-gap). Hold SL at breakeven; raise target slightly to 860 reflecting record-high breakout context. No-op on SL avoided since target changes."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226.00,
      "new_target": 1300.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +2.0%, breaking to new 52-week high on Q4 strength + CDMO ramp. SL at entry/breakeven (1.95% below CMP 1250, respects trail-gap). Bump target to 1300 — pharma sector at 52w highs, Laurus leading peers. No SL micro-adjust below 1% threshold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +1.1%, Q4 strong (+47% FY26 PAT), refrigerant capex catalyst intact. CMP 2802 vs entry 2785, only +0.6% — below the +2% breakeven-trail threshold, so no MODIFY warranted yet. SL 2735 (-1.7% from entry) appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB flat at entry 9100 / CMP 9104. Capital goods cluster mixed today (CGPOWER -0.1%, POLYCAB +0.6%), Q4 strong but margin compression noted. SL 9020 (-0.9%) tight but appropriate. No P&L move to justify SL trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "WOCKPHARMA -0.7%, intraday chop after +23% two-day run. SL 1600 sits just below CMP 1606 — well within the SL's normal-noise absorption budget. Rule 17: don't pre-empt the SL. Hold; let SL do its job or recovery occurs as pharma sector remains strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PIDILITIND -2.8%, CMP 1444 vs SL 1465 — SL is ABOVE CMP, meaning the stop has likely already been hit on the broker side or is about to fill. Q4 was actually strong (PAT +36.6%, EBITDA margin +280bps). Allow the SL to execute as planned rather than pre-empt or modify. If the SL didn't trip on the open candle (1468 high), it will on next dip."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL -3.1%, CMP 353 vs SL 354 — same situation: SL essentially at/above CMP, broker-side stop should trigger imminently. Thesis (Q4 beat, NBFC tailwind) intact but execution will play out via SL. Don't pre-empt with manual EXIT."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.8%, CMP 10568 vs SL 10440 (-1.2% buffer). Q4 was a blowout (+103% PAT, Rs 150 div, Rs 12,000 buyback). Today's weakness in Auto sector (-1.43%) is noise within thesis. Respect SL placement; no new info to justify pre-emption."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -2.1%, CMP 476 vs SL 472 (-0.9% buffer). FMCG strong today (HUL +4.7%, NESTLE +2.2%) but DABUR lagging on lower Q4 growth (rev only +5.17%). Hold to SL; thesis (defensive rotation) weakening but stop is doing its job."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.2%, CMP 123.65 vs SL 121.00. VIX +10% today supports the geopolitical-hedge thesis. SL 121 still has ~2.1% buffer. Hold the macro hedge."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Macro hedge intact at high VIX; SL 121 has 2.1% buffer."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven already; FMCG leadership today supports continued hold."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1355.44, "reasoning": "SL locked at +7.7% gain; target raised to 1450."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1465 above CMP 1444 — stop should be filling. No manual override."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Within SL absorption budget; pharma sector at 52w high supportive."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Below 2% gain threshold for SL trail."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat from entry; original SL appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 354 at/above CMP — broker stop will execute."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 thesis intact; SL has 1.2% buffer."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Respect SL; weak relative to FMCG peers but thesis not yet broken."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1226.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; target raised to 1300 on new 52w high breakout."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walked through fresh BULLISH candidates per Rule 18: (1) APOLLOHOSP +3.48% at ATH 8129 — bullish but extended; healthcare exposure already via WOCKPHARMA + LAURUSLABS, prefer not to add a third pharma/healthcare name on a chase. (2) CGPOWER at ATH Rs 872 with 3.2x volume — already hold POLYCAB in capital goods cluster; Rule 10 — at most 1 new addition to a cluster where I hold a name, and POLYCAB itself is still proving out, defer. (3) TORNTPHARM — Q4 results May 21, outside 3-session window but pharma exposure adequate. (4) DABUR fresh BUY not warranted, already hold. (5) NIFTYBEES — Nifty in downtrend with VIX +10%, mean-reversion not yet supported. CANCEL the stale HFCL BUY @ 133.50 — placed 7523 min ago (5+ days old), thesis stale, market in risk-off; will issue cancel via order management channel separately. Net: cash conservation appropriate given VIX spike + risk-off tape, but I am committed to reviewing fresh setups in next 2-3 ticks if breadth improves.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 45%, below 80% soft target. The under-deployment is justified today by: (a) India VIX +10% in a single session, (b) Nifty -1.15% with broad sector weakness, (c) two existing positions (PIDILITIND, ABCAPITAL) likely to stop out today freeing further capital. Conscious choice to wait for tape stabilization before adding new BULLISH candidates from watchlist — will reassess after 11:00 IST tick with updated breadth. Trailing SLs on the three meaningful winners (COFORGE +9.8%, MARICO +2.5%, LAURUSLABS +2%) per Rule 18 maintenance discipline. No new entries this tick — conservatism is earned by the VIX print, not anchoring."
}
